Boots of Deep Thought  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FEET
AC: 20
STA: +15 INT: +15 HP: +65 MANA: +65
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
Attack: +10 HP Regen +2
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FEET
AC: 20
STA: +15 INT: +15 HP: +65 MANA: +65
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3

Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
The Second Arcane Test

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name

# May 22 2003 at 11:55 PM Rating: Default

199 posts
These boots are now

# Oct 17 2003 at 9:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777540655
17 posts
nm.

Edited, Fri Oct 17 22:43:11 2003
▲ Page top
Very good boots
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 5:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783493403
131 posts
These boots have really good int caster stats

but i must say that, after the mod rod nerf, the necros are by far the ones who'd benefit the most of them (sta + hp + AoB = more lich = more mana)
then come the chanty (AC + sta + hp = can survive more when hit cause slow/debuffs/mez agro), and at the end the wiz/magicians.
▲ Page top
RE: Very good boots
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2004 at 5:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760228035
287 posts
int boots work for ALL int casters!!! Not one can this be more beneficial to...IMHO

I, for one, pack a mana robe... this is a lifesaver...
▲ Page top
Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 12:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Aura of Battle
Regeneration for 1200 Hit Points (HP) in 600 ticks
Increase Attack (ATK) by 10 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: Self

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 100 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 600 ticks (60.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You are surrounded by an aura of battle.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is surrounded by an aura of battle.
Spell fades: The aura of battle fades.
▲ Page top
awsome
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 11:00 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
in my opinion these boots are awsome. Think of having a mana robe with them, this would help any caster alot not just a necro.
▲ Page top
Not bad
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 1:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761765291
7 posts
If you *think* you have better boots than these, atleast get em for the regen =D heh, not really. These are nice though
▲ Page top
Aura of Battle
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 5:05 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
more of a tank effect. but hey, would be real nice for downtimes or a necro that is in lich form.

Increase Attack (ATK) by 10 (L1)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Skill: Alteration

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 12:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Look at the weight, ZERO. 15ac and sta to boot (no pun intended) these should be useable by monks in addition to casters.

QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2001 at 12:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756758585
43 posts
Y'know, I want all armor which only monks can wear to be increased in weight by 4 pounds. Hopefully this will then maek all these stupid, whining idiots overload, blow a blood vessel and never come back to EQ. Monk useable, my boney backside. Get a life!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 12:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why must these monkey morons stake claim to every item?
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 1:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Its hard to tell if the guy is joking or not. Hey, its got a good AC, and a few resists but other than that it has *nothing* a monk would want. So... why?
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 12:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Looks like someone deleted the post from the idiot who posted that this should be a monk item.
regen

its like a 2hp a tick regen. stacks with all other other spell regens too.

▲ Page top
Must...get...boots...
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 4:19 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
These are extremely nice boots, especially for necromancers. Why? Aura of battle has, so I'm told, a regen that stacks with nearly everything. Very nice for those of us who are too proud (read: lazy) to start over as iksars. Good thing they're pure int caster only. Otherwise they'd probably go to some shadowknight or something.
▲ Page top
RE: Must...get...boots...
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 2:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
Amen :) I don't know if most higher level necros are just pre-Kunark but recently I have been noticing that few 50+ necros are Iksars. Heck, few necros are Iksars, period. I don't know if it has to do with the base int or what... but durring peak hours, out of maybe 40 non anon 50+ necros, 3 or so are Iksars. Even those are usualy low 50s. I amit, we are not too good pre 50, but post 50, watch out. Hehe. Recently, I had a level 54 necro brag about how he can now sit down with allure of death and not lose health. I informed him that, at 51, I can do the same thing standing up. At 51, I now regen 12 a tick sitting down wich is enough to break even on Call of Bones. Gained 4 points of standing regen at 51, 2 points of sitting at 50. I can't wait to see what future level increases will be. I expect not as drastic as the level 51 increase, though. I am always too lazy to look it up.... *runs off to go look it up while he is thinking about it*

Peace. Long live the elusive Iksar necro.
▲ Page top
RE: Must...get...boots...
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2001 at 9:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767410940
9 posts
Heya :) - I'm one of the senior Iksar necromancers on Prexus. On the server, we currently have one 60th (Malwor) of which I am aware. From personal experience, I can tell you the increased regen after 50 that we get is HUGE. I'm sold on the combination big time and I am absolutely drooling to get my hands on these boots and some of the rest of these Halls of Testing items. My guild is currently posed to begin raiding there soon, so watch out!! :)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 09 2001 at 11:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Nah, if it was usable by more than just int. casters it wouldnt go to a sk. By the time you are powerful enough to do these quests sk's should have way better ac boots than these. A monk on the other hand . . . .j/k =P
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 26 2001 at 9:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Rofl, here we go with the monk thing again, and again, and again :P
